title: UI/UX Design and Development for adamo.es
description: UI engineering with SCSS/Less and JavaScript for adamo.es, integrating complex registration flows with external APIs.
body:
**Adamo** is a telecommunications operator that needed a solid digital presence and registration and onboarding flows that worked flawlessly for its end users.

## UI Engineering with SCSS and JavaScript

The interface was built on a modular CSS architecture with **SCSS/Less**, ensuring visual consistency across the platform. The interaction layer, implemented with **JavaScript**, covered everything from form validations to transitions and real-time visual feedback.

## Integration with External APIs

One of the main challenges was integrating **complex registration flows** with external APIs: coverage verification, data validation, and connecting with customer management systems. The experience needed to be seamless despite the backend complexity.

## Stack and Platform

The project combined **WordPress** as a content base with custom components in **Bootstrap**, tailored to the client's branding and functional requirements.

## Technologies

-   HTML5
-   CSS3
-   JavaScript
-   REST APIs
-   Bootstrap
-   WordPress

Client: [adamo.es](https://www.adamo.es/)
